import requests

response = requests.post('http://localhost:58517/todo/tasks')
data = response.json()

print('=== 最终待办列表 ===\n')

    tags = f" [Tags: {', '.join(t.get('tags', []))}]" if t.get('tags') else ""
    due = f" Due:{t.get('due_date')}" if t.get('due_date') else ""
    print(f"{status} {t['task_id']}: {t['title']}{tags}{due}")
